Short title and commencement.— (1) These rules may be called the National Green Tribunal (Practices and Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Green Tribunal (Practices and Procedure) Rules, 2011, in rule 3, in sub-rule (1), the following proviso shall be inserted, namely:— “Provided that in exceptional circumstances the Chairperson may constitute a single Member bench.”. [F. No. 17(52)/2017-PL/NGT] ARUN KUMAR MEHTA, Addl. Secy. Note: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 296(E), dated the 4th April, 2011. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
